contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 25
- Description: Whitepaper live-page fixes: drop OpenClaw, early-exit equity, governor privileges
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/152
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_prod/pull/13
  
  Details:
  Applied three corrections to the live TrueSight whitepaper page (truesight_me/whitepaper/index.html, the new source of truth after the Google Doc was deprecated): (1) removed the retired OpenClaw mention from the Communications/Beer Hall section; (2) corrected the early-exit clause - the penalty reclaims a member's equity position in the managed ledger at a discount, not their governance tokens (was factually wrong); (3) expanded governor privileges to WhatsApp AND Telegram channel administration plus authority over the DApp permission system (signed permission changes to permissions.json via governor_permissions.html), and updated the Governors-tab source-of-truth sentence to match. Shipped on beta (truesight_me_beta#152) then promoted to prod via cherry-pick (truesight_me_prod#13) to preserve prod's truesight.me CNAME - avoided the gh repo sync --force trap. Verified prod main carries all 3 fixes with CNAME intact.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 41.67
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
